allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({engines: pkg.engines, scripts: pkg.scripts, dependencies: pkg.dependencies, devDependencies: pkg.devDependencies}, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./node_modules/better-sqlite3/package.json'\); console.log\('better-sqlite3 version:', pkg.version\); console.log\('engines:', JSON.stringify\(pkg.engines\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const bsq = lock.packages['node_modules/better-sqlite3']; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(bsq, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const prebuild = lock.packages['node_modules/prebuild-install']; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(prebuild, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('JSON committed valido'\);}\);")
